options.content:
| Input | Current Value | Direct Design Impact |
|---|---:|---|
| Platform Year | ${platformYear} | 2030 blended-fuel architecture / 2035 onboard milling architecture |
| MS-SOFC Units | ${msSofcUnits} | stack/module packaging thickness |
| MS-SOFC Output | ${msSofcKwUnit} kW/unit | base-load continuity |
| Solid-State Battery | ${ssbKwh} kWh | center floor thickness / vehicle weight |
| LH2 Buffer | ${lh2BufferKg} kg-H2 | cryogenic tank volume / floor packaging |
| City Gas Ratio | ${cityGasRatioPct}% | gas tank and reformer package |
| Hydrogen Ratio | ${hydrogenRatioPct}% | LH2/MH storage package |
| Electric Support | ${electricSupportKwh} kWh | battery package / transient power |

| Component | Assumption | Package H/W/D | Thickness Effect | KPI Link |
|---|---:|---:|---|---|
| MS-SOFC Modules | ${msSofcUnits} × ${msSofcKwUnit} kW | 320 / 1000 / 1400 mm | center/upper stack height | uptime / dispatch continuity |
| Solid-State Battery | ${ssbKwh} kWh | 260 / 1200 / 2200 mm | center floor height | vehicle weight / payload |
| LH2 Buffer | ${lh2BufferKg} kg-H2 | 280 / 350 / 1400 mm | left-side cryogenic package | range / refill buffer |
| City Gas Tank | ${cityGasRatioPct}% blend support | 300 / 400 / 1600 mm | side package / reforming system | fuel cost / energy continuity |
| Reformer | blended fuel support | 260 / 350 / 700 mm | front package height | city gas conversion |
| Inverter + DC/DC | 240 kW / 200 kW | 180 / 420 / 650 + 160 / 350 / 500 mm | upper center package | electric continuity |
| Cooling / Radiator | 96 kW class | 180 / 500 / 1400 mm | front thermal package | uptime / durability |

| Step | Calculation / Judgment | Resulting Design Constraint | KPI Impact |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1. Energy demand | 1.2 kWh/km × 1000 km = 1200 kWh | total energy target | range / trips/day |
| 2. Fuel energy | 1200 ÷ 60% = 2000 kWh | MS-SOFC fuel requirement | energy continuity |
| 3. Hydrogen share | 2000 × ${hydrogenRatioPct}% | LH2 / H2 package volume | floor thickness / range |
| 4. City gas share | 2000 × ${cityGasRatioPct}% | city gas tank + reformer package | fuel cost / packaging |
| 5. Electric support | ${electricSupportKwh} kWh battery | center floor battery height | payload / floor height |
| 6. Component stacking | max component height + structure + thermal margin | platform thickness | accessibility / conversion |
| 7. Operation impact | thickness and weight affect payload and boarding | utilization / load factor | revenue / contribution |

| Design Driver | KPI Direction | Business Effect |
|---|---|---|
| Battery kWh ↑ | vehicle weight ↑ / payload ↓ | utilization and contribution decrease |
| LH2 buffer ↑ | range buffer ↑ / package volume ↑ | refill risk decreases but floor height risk increases |
| City gas ratio ↑ | LH2 volume pressure ↓ / reformer package ↑ | 2030 fuel cost stability improves |
| Hydrogen ratio ↑ | tank/storage volume ↑ | floor thickness and packaging pressure increase |
| MS-SOFC units ↑ | base-load stability ↑ / package weight ↑ | uptime improves, payload may decline |
| Cooling package ↑ | thermal stability ↑ / front package ↑ | durability improves, packaging worsens |
